title: SecAI OS Policy
description: JSON Schema for the SecAI OS policy configuration file (policy.yaml). Governs model acceptance, tool execution, web search, and egress behavior.

version.description: Schema version number for this policy file.

runtime_egress.description: Default network egress policy at runtime. Should always be 'deny' for security.

store_raw_prompts.description: Whether to store raw user prompts in audit logs. Privacy-sensitive.

store_raw_responses.description: Whether to store raw LLM responses in audit logs. Privacy-sensitive.

allowed_formats.description: File formats accepted by the quarantine pipeline.

require_scan.description: Require static scanning (modelscan, gguf-guard) before promotion.

require_behavior_tests.description: Require behavioral/adversarial prompt testing before promotion.

require_source_verification.description: Require source origin verification against the allowlist.

require_entropy_analysis.description: Require entropy analysis to detect anomalous weight distributions.

allow_diffusion_directories.description: Allow multi-file diffusion model directories (model_index.json + safetensors).

format_gate.description: Stage 2: Validate file headers and reject unsafe formats.

behavioral_test.description: Stage 6: Adversarial prompt suite (LLM models only).

diffusion_deep_scan.description: Stage 7: Config integrity check (diffusion models only).

smoke_test_max_score.description: Fail if more than this fraction of prompts are flagged.

smoke_test_max_critical.description: Fail if more than this number of critical flags are raised.

gguf_guard.description: gguf-guard integration settings for deep GGUF model analysis.

required.description: If true, quarantine fails (fail-closed) when gguf-guard is not installed.

generate_manifest.description: Generate a per-tensor SHA-256 integrity manifest on promotion.

generate_fingerprint.description: Generate a structural fingerprint on promotion.

verify_on_integrity_check.description: Verify the per-tensor manifest during periodic integrity checks.

tools.description: Tool firewall policy governing LLM tool call permissions.

default.description: Default action for tools not in the allow or deny list.

requests_per_minute.description: Maximum tool calls per minute across all tools.

burst_size.description: Maximum burst size for rate limiting.

allow.description: Tools explicitly allowed, with optional path and argument constraints.

paths_allowlist.description: Glob patterns for allowed filesystem paths. Use trailing /** for recursive.

paths_denylist.description: Glob patterns for denied filesystem paths (checked before allowlist).

args_blocklist.description: Substrings that cause an argument to be rejected.

max_arg_length.description: Maximum allowed length for any single argument value.

deny.description: Tools explicitly denied. Deny always wins over allow.

enabled.description: Master switch for web search. Disabled by default for privacy.

max_query_length.description: Maximum query length after PII stripping.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results returned per search.

max_context_length.description: Maximum context size injected into LLM (characters).

strip_pii.description: Strip PII patterns from outbound queries. Should always be true.

block_high_pii_queries.description: Block queries where more than 50% of tokens are redacted PII.

detect_injection.description: Scan inbound results for prompt injection patterns.

audit.description: Write a hash-chained audit record for every search attempt.

allowed_engines.description: SearXNG search engines to enable (privacy-respecting only).

differential_privacy.description: Differential privacy protections for search queries.

decoy_count.description: Number of decoy searches sent per real search. 0 to disable.

uniqueness_mode.description: How to handle highly unique/identifying queries.

batch_window.description: Batch timing window in seconds. Queries within this window are grouped.

enabled.description: Master switch for egress. Disabled by default (biggest privacy risk surface).

allowed_destinations.description: URL prefixes allowed for outbound requests.

max_body_size.description: Maximum request body size in bytes (default 10 MB).

content_rules.description: Content scanning rules for outbound request bodies.

block_if_contains.description: Substrings that cause the request body to be blocked.

scan_for_pii.description: Scan outbound bodies for PII patterns (SSN, credit card, email, etc.).

scan_for_credentials.description: Scan outbound bodies for credential patterns (API keys, tokens, passwords).
